notes: Organizational context informs ITIL strategy management
Leadership and commitment supports ITIL strategy and direction
ISO 20000 risk actions map to ITIL risk management practice
Service management objectives support continual improvement
Competence requirements map to workforce and talent management
Documented information supports knowledge management
ISO 20000 knowledge requirements directly map to ITIL knowledge management
Service portfolio maps to ITIL portfolio management
Service catalogue management directly maps to ITIL service catalogue management
Asset management maps to ITIL IT asset management
Configuration management directly maps to ITIL service configuration management
Business relationship management maps to ITIL relationship management
Service level management directly maps to ITIL SLM
Supplier management maps to ITIL supplier management
Budgeting and accounting maps to ITIL service financial management
Capacity management maps to ITIL capacity and performance management
Change management directly maps to ITIL change enablement
Design and transition maps to ITIL service design
Release and deployment maps to ITIL release management
Release and deployment also maps to ITIL deployment management
Incident management directly maps to ITIL incident management
Service request management maps to ITIL service request management
Problem management directly maps to ITIL problem management
Service availability management maps to ITIL availability management
Service continuity management maps to ITIL service continuity management
Information security management maps to ITIL ISM
Monitoring and measurement maps to ITIL measurement and reporting
Service reporting maps to ITIL measurement and reporting
Continual improvement maps to ITIL continual improvement
